plan.narration_reading: Pinned by meaning in time order. Open on #01 dice (hook) at 'Ten centuries before the cross'; #02 David-at-lamp on 'a song recorded'; #04 the Hebrew line on 'Psalm twenty-two'; #03 David dying in old age on 'never executed... died an old man'; #11 the two-sided David/cross on 'describing someone else'; #08 the scroll+surrounding-beasts vision on 'stripped, surrounded'; #09 the heap of stripped clothes on 'divide his clothes'; #12 the dice macro on 'cast lots upon my vesture'; #06 soldiers at the cross on 'soldiers dividing Jesus' clothes'; #05 the seamless coat on 'the seamless coat'; #10 the sovereign cross on 'the cross was no accident. It was the plan'; #13 Christ's face on 'has a name: Jesus'; #14 the crucifixion on 'laying down His life'. Hero #07 (the cross) closes as the held gospel landing.
plan.red_team_notes: Three crucified-Christ frames cluster at the end (#13 face, #14 crucifixion, #07 hero) — they read as a deliberate gospel crescendo, and the scale changes (intimate face vs wide cross vs hero still) keep them distinct. 13 clips over 64s plus each clip's internal reframes gives strong density; the allocator will speed clips up rather than slow them. Two scroll clips (#04, #08) are similar but land on different beats (the line vs the surrounded-vision).

slots.rationale: Dice in the dust — the arresting scroll-stopper under the opening line about the cross.
David at the lamp recording the song — 'a song recorded'.
slots.beat_phrase: a song recorded exactly how a dying man's clothes would be divided

slots.rationale: Fingertip on the Hebrew line — 'Psalm twenty-two', the written text.
Aged David dying in peace — 'David himself was never executed; he died an old man'.
slots.beat_phrase: but David himself was never executed;

slots.rationale: Two-sided David-and-distant-cross — 'He was describing someone else'.
The Psalm scroll with the surrounding beasts vision — 'stripped, surrounded, his life poured out'.
slots.beat_phrase: stripped, surrounded, his life poured out.

slots.rationale: Heap of stripped garments — 'the dying man's killers would divide his clothes'.
slots.beat_phrase: he wrote that the dying man's killers would divide his clothes,

slots.rationale: Dice caught mid-tumble — 'cast lots upon my vesture'.
slots.beat_phrase: and cast lots upon my vesture."

slots.rationale: Soldiers casting lots at the foot of the cross — 'soldiers dividing Jesus' clothes'.
The seamless tunic held between soldiers — 'casting lots for the seamless coat'.
slots.beat_phrase: then casting lots for the seamless coat —

slots.rationale: The sovereign crucified Christ — 'the cross was no accident. It was the plan'.
slots.beat_phrase: you'd know the cross was no accident.

slots.rationale: Christ's reverent face — 'has a name: Jesus'.
slots.beat_phrase: The suffering man of Psalm twenty-two has a name:

slots.rationale: The crucifixion at middle distance — 'laying down His life to win you back'.
slots.beat_phrase: They rolled dice for the clothes off His back,

slots.rationale: Hero close — the cut lands on Christ (single appearance, no reuse).

panel.note: 13 clips at avg 1.56x over 64s — fast, lots of distinct moments, true viral pacing; each clip's internal reframes add density. The intended fix to the earlier slow-mo cut.

Every clip sits under its phrase: dice on the opening, David on 'a song recorded', the line on 'Psalm twenty-two', dying David on 'never executed', soldiers/coat on the John 19 beats, sovereign cross on 'no accident', face on 'Jesus', crucifixion on 'laying down His life'.
13 distinct body clips; hero #07 once at close.
Brisk (max 2.2x, 11/13 trimmed). On Baroque oil this risks the occasional fast cut, but it is the requested viral edit; sacred frames (#10/#13/#14/#07) sit at/near the close at lower speed.
Opens on the dice hook, builds through the proof, closes on the cross (#07) after the face and crucifixion — lands squarely on Christ.
Dice cold-open stops the scroll; the fast cadence holds attention; the three-Christ crescendo at the end gives the gospel landing weight.

gates.evidence: 13 distinct body clips; hero #07 appears once (close only) — no reuse.
avg speed 1.56x, max 2.20x, 11/13 trimmed — brisk; verify it does not strobe.
gates.fix: Reduce clip count (lower --clips) so slots breathe.
